exercises.title: Build a Complete Middleware Stack
exercises.description: Create an Express application with a complete middleware stack including logging, authentication, validation, and error handling. Apply middleware to different route groups.

exercises.title: Create Middleware for Request Transformation
exercises.description: Build middleware that transforms request data: normalize emails to lowercase, trim strings, convert strings to proper case, and add timestamps to requests.

exercises.title: Build a Rate Limiter Middleware
exercises.description: Create a custom rate limiter middleware that limits requests per IP address. Implement different limits for different routes and include proper headers in responses.

summary: These exercises demonstrate creating custom middleware for logging, authentication, validation, request transformation, and rate limiting. They show practical patterns used in production Express applications.
